Job poster

Message

About the job

Enterprise Architect – Microsoft, Agile, Governance, Principals, Standards, Leadership – Permanent, up to £90,000p.a. + Bonus.

My client, a leading Financial Organisation is seeking a Enterprise Architect to join their Warsaw office on a permanent basis.

You will be tasked to define and set up the Architectural function with touchpoints across all pillars (Data, Application, Infrastructure, etc.) This role will review the current architecture landscape, introduce clear governance, standards, and methodologies, and ensure all technology solutions are scalable, well-engineered, and aligned to business strategy.

In addition, you’ll lead a team of 3 architects and work closely with Technology and Business leaders to drive consistency and future-ready design.

To be successful you will have

  • Proven Lead / Enterprise Architect experience within financial services.
  • Strong background in cloud-based or hybrid environments (Microsoft preferred).
  • Broad architectural expertise across applications, integration, data, and cloud.
  • Experience defining architecture frameworks and standards.
  • Comfortable working in Agile / DevOps environments.
  • Strong stakeholder engagement and leadership capability.

Requirements added by the job poster

• 2+ years of work experience with Enterprise Architecture

• 2+ years of work experience with Financial Services

About the company

Morson Edge (Financial Services)

Staffing and Recruiting

•

26 on LinkedIn

Formerly Cornwallis elt. Specialist talent for a sharper financial future. Morson Edge (Financial Services) connects global institutions, fintech pioneers and professional services firms with senior talent that drives clarity, control and growth. We make leadership decisive. We make transformation strategic. We make complexity manageable. Our network spans risk, governance, technology and change. We partner with clients who need precision, discretion and pace to stay ahead in fast-moving markets. As part of Morson Group, we work with Morson Praxis (consultancy), Morson Vital (deployment) and Morson Nexus (skills) to deliver a connected workforce solution that links strategy with execution. Find the leadership that defines financial progress.
